data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the approval workflow requirement.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for an approval workflow (supervisor review and approval). However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality is implemented or operational. The linked use case mentions the need for an approval workflow, but there are no specific examples or evidence demonstrating that this feature has been tested or validated in the current saga run.
gaps: No evidence of the approval workflow functionality being tested or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the approval workflow requirement.
